title: Gangtok、Sikkim — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Gangtok、Sikkim的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Gangtok是Sikkim的一個城市，人口約100,000。The capital of Sikkim, a scenic Himalayan hill station with stunning views of Kanchenjunga, Buddhist monasteries, and vibrant culture.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
